item.title: Mini Excavator Rollover Rescue
item.description: A mini excavator tips over, creating a big challenge. How does Ron Pratt turn the rollover into a rescue?

media:content.media:description: A mini excavator tips over, creating a big challenge. How does Ron Pratt turn the rollover into a rescue?

item.title: Trash Truck Incident
item.description: A routine job turns complex as a trash truck requires a careful recovery. How do crews manage large service vehicles in tight situations?

media:content.media:title: Trash Truck Incident
media:content.media:description: A routine job turns complex as a trash truck requires a careful recovery. How do crews manage large service vehicles in tight situations?

item.title: Highway Chaos Ends in a Field
item.description: A roadside incident spirals into chaos. How does the recovery team bring order back to the highway?

media:content.media:description: A roadside incident spirals into chaos. How does the recovery team bring order back to the highway?

item.title: Tator vs. The Dozer
item.description: It’s tow truck versus dozer in a battle of strength. Who wins when heavy machinery goes head‑to‑head?

item.title: Ram’s river mishap calls for a muddy rescue
item.description: A truck ends up stuck near a riverbank, leading to a muddy and complex recovery operation. How do crews handle slippery, waterlogged terrain?

media:content.media:title: Ram’s river mishap calls for a muddy rescue
media:content.media:description: A truck ends up stuck near a riverbank, leading to a muddy and complex recovery operation. How do crews handle slippery, waterlogged terrain?

item.title: 220,000 LBS Stuck
item.description: A demanding recovery job puts skill, equipment, and planning to the test. What makes heavy recoveries so complex?

item.title: Loaded tanker stuck off the road
item.description: A fully loaded tanker ends up off-road, requiring precision and caution to recover safely. What challenges come with moving heavy liquid loads?

media:content.media:description: A fully loaded tanker ends up off-road, requiring precision and caution to recover safely. What challenges come with moving heavy liquid loads?

item.description: When size alone isn’t enough, teamwork steps in. What recovery effort gets this giant back on track?

item.description: An unusual situation involving a stolen bobcat takes an unexpected turn. What led to the outcome of this incident?

item.title: Unloading a 20-Foot Container
item.description: A massive container demands careful handling. How does Ron Pratt manage the unload without a hitch?
